data_quality_notes: Used World Bank indicator 'NV.IND.TOTL.ZS' (Industry value added (% of GDP)) as proxy for industrial energy consumption. EDGAR NetCDF data was not directly accessible. Proxy covers 205 countries over years 1990-2024. Note: EDGAR NetCDF data was not directly accessible; World Bank energy/industry data used as proxy instead. Reporting delays of 2-3 years in emissions inventories. Country-level aggregation may obscure spatial heterogeneity.
summary: Testing whether industrial energy consumption correlates with ozone exposure in KBAs. Used World Bank industrial energy proxy (n=3850 obs, 200 countries). Pearson r=0.086 (p=0.0000), Spearman rho=-0.007. Verdict: partially_confirmed.
